name: cloudshops-analytics
description: Query the Cloudshops analytics database from your LLM client using friendly business names. Read-only SELECT/WITH only. Saves and loads analyses in your tenant-scoped S3 prefix.

profile.title: Preset profile (optional)
profile.description: Pick a known tenant preset so you only have to enter the API token. Currently supported: 'dinasi-stage'. Leave empty to enter API URL and Tenant ID manually below.

api_url.title: Backend API URL
api_url.description: Cloudshops backend gateway base URL, e.g. https://api.example.com (no trailing slash). Required if no profile is selected. Overrides the profile preset when set.

api_token.title: Analytics API Token
api_token.description: JWT minted in your tenant admin -> Settings -> API Tokens with scope=analytics:read. Stored in the system keychain.

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier sent in the x-tenant header. Must match the tenant claim in the JWT. Required if no profile is selected. Overrides the profile preset when set.
